title: Floralcraft Green Lacquered Florist Stub Wire/Stem Wire - 20 SWG (0.9mm) x 12" - 25 Wires, Ideal For DYI Craft Floral Arrangements
features: Floralcraft Green Stub Wire – green coated to help prevent rusting and also looks like real stem
Each stem wire is pre-cut, pick up and go, saving time on flower arrangements
Floral stub wire, used to lengthen, support flower stems and heads
Ideal for all general wiring work, can be used with fresh, dried and silk flowers
description: Floralcraft Green Lacquered Stub Wire - 20 SWG x 12" (25 wires), Flower wire is perfect for wiring flowers, artificial flower making, reinforce cutting flowers, handicrafts, wrapping wedding bouquet flowers. Secures floral materials to wreaths and frames. Ideal for all general wiring work, supporting stems and flower heads. Can be used with fresh, dried and silk flowers
